headline: Assessing Steel Dynamics (STLD) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Steel Dynamics Stock Is Drawing Investor Attention Now Steel Dynamics (STLD) is back on investor radar after a strong recent run, with the stock up about 21% over the past month and roughly 19% over the past 3 months. Those gains come alongside annual revenue of US$19.0b and net income of US$1.37b, figures that give investors concrete scale to compare against the company’s recent share price performance.
